message:
fix(ci): only open issues for Build failures on main, not PR branches (#7646)

The workflow-failure-issue monitor had a carve-out for "Build and Deploy
KC" that fired on any event type including pull_request. This created
spurious issues (e.g. #7643) when PR branches had build failures —
which is expected CI behavior, not an incident.

Restrict the Build and Deploy KC condition to head_branch == 'main'.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,7 +35,8 @@ jobs:
       github.event.workflow_run.conclusion == 'failure' &&
       (github.event.workflow_run.event == 'schedule' ||
        github.event.workflow_run.event == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
-       github.event.workflow_run.name == 'Build and Deploy KC')
+       (github.event.workflow_run.name == 'Build and Deploy KC' &&
+        github.event.workflow_run.head_branch == 'main'))
     steps:
       - name: Check for existing open issue
         id: check
